# atlassian_confluence_space (Resource)

Manages a Confluence Cloud space.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "atlassian_confluence_space" "example" {
  key  = "EXAMPLE"
  name = "Example Space"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `key` (String) The space key (uppercase letters, e.g. MYSPACE). Changing this forces recreation.
- `name` (String) The display name of the space.

### Optional

- `description` (String) The plain-text description of the space.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The numeric ID of the space.
